---
title: "Medical Cost Personal Dataset - EDA"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: bootstrap
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(tidyverse)

insurance_df <- read.csv("insurance.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    sex = as.factor(sex),
    smoker = as.factor(smoker),
    region = as.factor(region),
    children = as.integer(children)
  )
```

Overview
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Verteilung der Versicherungskosten (charges)

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = charges)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 40,
                 fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_density(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(x = "Kosten (charges)", y = "Dichte") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Boxplot charges

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = "", y = charges)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", width = 0.3) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Kosten") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Row {data-height=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Key Facts

```{r}
valueBox(paste0("$", round(mean(insurance_df$charges), 0)), 
         caption = "Durchschnittliche Kosten", icon = "fa-dollar-sign")
```

### Anzahl Datensaetze

```{r}
valueBox(nrow(insurance_df), caption = "Anzahl Versicherte", icon = "fa-users")
```

### Anteil Raucher

```{r}
pct_smoker <- round(mean(insurance_df$smoker == "yes") * 100, 1)
valueBox(paste0(pct_smoker, "%"), caption = "Raucheranteil", icon = "fa-smoking")
```

Age & BMI
=======================================================================

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Altersverteilung

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 3, fill = "#4C9F70", color = "white") +
  labs(x = "Alter", y = "Anzahl") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Alter vs. Kosten

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = age, y = charges)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "grey40") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "#4C9F70", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Alter", y = "Kosten (charges)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### BMI Verteilung

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = bmi)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 30,
                 fill = "#E69F00", color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_density(color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(x = "BMI", y = "Dichte") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### BMI vs. Kosten

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = bmi, y = charges)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "grey40") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "#E69F00", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "BMI", y = "Kosten (charges)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Smoker, Sex & Region
=======================================================================

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Raucherstatus (Counts)

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = smoker, fill = smoker)) +
  geom_bar() +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("no" = "#4C9F70", "yes" = "#D6604D")) +
  labs(x = "Raucher", y = "Anzahl") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
```

### Kosten: Raucher vs. Nichtraucher (95% CI)

```{r}
smoker_summary <- insurance_df %>%
  group_by(smoker) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_charges = mean(charges),
    sd_charges = sd(charges),
    n = n(),
    se = sd_charges / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower = mean_charges - qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se,
    ci_upper = mean_charges + qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se
  )

ggplot(smoker_summary, aes(x = smoker, y = mean_charges, fill = smoker)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), width = 0.15) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(mean_charges, 0)), vjust = -2.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("no" = "#4C9F70", "yes" = "#D6604D")) +
  labs(x = "Raucherstatus", y = "Durchschnittliche Kosten") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Kosten nach Geschlecht

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = sex, y = charges, fill = sex)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "text",
               aes(label = round(after_stat(y), 0)), vjust = -0.7, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Geschlecht", y = "Kosten") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
```

### Kosten nach Region

```{r}
ggplot(insurance_df, aes(x = region, y = charges, fill = region)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "text",
               aes(label = round(after_stat(y), 0)), vjust = -0.7, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(x = "Region", y = "Kosten") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
```
